verses.1: Praise ye the LORD. Praise, O ye servants of the LORD, praise the name of the LORD.
verses.2: Blessed be the name of the LORD from this time forth and for evermore.
verses.3: From the rising of the sun to the going down of the same the LORD'S name is to be praised.
verses.4: The LORD is high above all nations, and his glory above the heavens.
verses.5: Who is like to the LORD our God, who dwelleth on high.
verses.6: Who humbleth himself to behold the things that are in heaven, and in the earth!
verses.7: He raiseth the poor out of the dust, and lifteth the needy out of the dunghill;
verses.8: That he may set him with princes, even with the princes of his people.
verses.9: He maketh the barren woman to keep house, and to be a joyful mother of children. Praise ye the LORD.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
